case_title: RICHARD LANGFORD DBA LANGFORD LAND SURVEYING VS. LE ANDRE DAVIS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY RICHARD LANGFORD DBA LANGFORD LAND SURVEYING AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, LE ANDRE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-26-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-26-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICHARD LANGFORD DBA LANGFORD LAND SURVEYING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVIS, LE ANDRE $800.00 PRINCIPAL, $88.22 INTEREST, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $948.22, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$30.00) SERVED MAR-29-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, LE ANDRE
